title: guettarda macrantha
intro: Guettarda macrantha, also known as the pride of Guadeloupe, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Caribbean and Central America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, and support the immune system. Guettarda macrantha can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
